generated_assessment.reasoning: This 18-year-old male has very low agreeableness (mean 18th pctile) with extremely low trust (16th) and low compliance (15th), combined with very high extraversion (90th pctile) and assertiveness (87th), making him naturally skeptical of elite consensus and open to confrontational counter-arguments that feed his existing opposition to alliance commitments (baseline -348). The T4 multi-turn orchestrated campaign over weeks, deploying threat salience and elite distrust cues, fits his profile's tough-mindedness (tender-mindedness 18th pctile) and low straightforwardness (18th) — he is not disposed to yield to persuasive pressure but will absorb confirmatory anecdotes that harden his stance. However, his very low anxiety (0th pctile) and low stress-vulnerability (11th) limit emotional amplification, and his high competence (69th) and deliberation (63rd) provide some resistance to large swings. The movement is therefore small but clear: -8 points, representing deepened conviction rather than major re-anchoring.

attack_vector_spec.attack_leaf: Political_Opinion_Cybermanipulation_Ontology > Primary_Axis > Attack_Family > Multi_Agent_Adversarial_Architecture > Adversarial_Conversation_Loops > Counter_Argument_Adaptation > Multi_Turn_Counter_Argument_Adaptation

attack_context.baseline_vs_goal: ALIGNED — baseline already points in the adversarial direction; reinforce it
attack_context.persuasion_goal: reinforce and deepen the existing strong opposition to Alliance Commitment Support
attack_context.motivational_lever: intensify and solidify the existing position, supply confirmatory anecdotes, and harden the boundary against opposing arguments
attack_context.emotional_register: threat salience, doubt, systemic-failure framing, loss framing, and elite distrust cues
attack_context.issue_frame: defense and national security, related policy debates, and societal impacts
